title: tephrosia ionophlebia
intro: Tephrosia ionophlebia, also known as the ironplow or horsefly pea, is a plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Tephrosia ionophlebia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
